title: List
description: Displays a virtualized, focusable list with single/multiple selection, custom item/header/footer templates, and loading/empty states.

sections.title: Multiple
sections.description: Toggle between single and multiple selection modes with the multiple property.

sections.title: Custom Header
sections.description: Provide a custom header using the ax-header slot.

sections.title: Custom Footer
sections.description: Provide a custom footer using the ax-footer slot.

sections.title: Custom Item
sections.description: Customize list items using the itemTemplate input.

sections.title: Custom Loading
sections.description: Show a custom loading state with the loadingTemplate input.

sections.title: Custom Empty
sections.description: Display a custom empty state with the emptyTemplate input when no items are available.

sections.title: Selection Mode
sections.description: Toggle between different selection modes: single, multiple, or none using the selectionMode property.

props.name: dataSource
props.description: Defines the data source for the list.

props.name: itemHeight
props.description: Sets the height of each item in the list.

props.name: itemTemplate
props.description: Template for rendering individual items in the list.

props.name: emptyTemplate
props.description: Template to display when the list is empty.

props.name: loadingTemplate
props.description: Template to show while the list is loading.

props.name: isItemTruncated
props.description: Determines if an item is truncated.

props.name: showItemTooltip
props.description: Determines if a tooltip is shown for an item.

props.name: checkbox
props.description: Specifies whether the checkbox is enabled.

props.name: valueField
props.description: Field name used to extract the unique value from items. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: textField
props.description: Field name used to extract the display text from items. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: textTemplate
props.description: Template string for formatting item display text. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: disabledField
props.description: Field name used to determine if an item is disabled. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: multiple
props.description: Whether multiple items can be selected. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Defines the selection mode for the list: 'single', 'multiple', or 'none'.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier of the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the component instance. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, the component is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: If set to true, user cannot change the value of component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: state
props.description: The current state of the component (clear, success, error). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: dirty
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been modified. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: selectedItems
props.description: Array of currently selected items. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

props.name: disabledCallback
props.description: Callback function to determine if an item should be disabled. Inherited from MXSelectionValueComponent.

events.name: onItemClick
events.description: Emitted when an item in the list is clicked.

events.name: onScrolledIndexChanged
events.description: Emitted when the index of the scrolled item changes.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emitted when the readonly state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Emitted when the value changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when the disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Deprecated: Use ngModelChange instead. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: stateChange
events.description: Emitted when the component state changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: validationRulesChange
events.description: Emitted when validation rules change. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Renders the component by updating the viewport size, scrolling to the last index, and optionally focusing the element.
 */
render(): void

/**
 * Refreshes the list by clearing the selection cache and reloading the data source.
 * @param clearSelection Whether to clear the selection cache when refreshing.
 */
refresh(clearSelection?: boolean): void

/**
 * Scrolls the viewport to the specified item index.
 * @param index The index of the item to scroll to.
 */
scrollToIndex(index: number): void

/**
 * Retrieves an item from the data source based on the provided key.
 * @param key The key used to identify the item.
 */
getItemByKey(key: unknown): Promise<unknown> | unknown

/**
 * Sets focus to the first selectable list item. If no item is available, postpones focus.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 *  Check component is focused or has any focused element.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>)

/**
 * Marks the component as dirty (modified).
 */
markAsDirty(): void

/**
 * Marks the component as touched.
 */
markAsTouched(): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnChange(fn: (value: any) => void): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Writes a value to the component (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param value - The value to write.
 */
writeValue(value: any): void

/**
 * Commits a value with optional user interaction flag.
 *
 * @param value - The value to commit.
 * @param u - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
commitValue(value: any, u?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets the component value.
 *
 * @param e - Optional flag indicating if this is a user interaction.
 */
reset(e?: boolean): void

/**
 * Resets validation errors.
 */
resetErrors(): void

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * @param ruleToRemove - The validation rule to remove.
 */
removeValidationRule(ruleToRemove: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - Validation result.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Unselects the specified items from the selection.
 * @param items Items to unselect
 */
unselectItems(...items: T[]): void

/**
 * Selects the specified items.
 * @param items Items to select
 */
selectItems(...items: T[]): void

/**
 * Toggles the selection state of the specified items.
 * @param items Items to toggle
 */
toggleSelect(...items: T[]): void

/**
 * Checks if an item is currently selected.
 * @param item Item to check
 * @returns True if the item is selected
 */
isItemSelected(item: T): boolean

/**
 * Checks if an item is disabled.
 * @param item Item to check
 * @returns True if the item is disabled
 */
isItemDisabled(item: T): boolean

/**
 * Gets the display text for an item using template or text field.
 * @param item Item to get display text for
 * @returns Formatted display text
 */
getDisplayText(item: T): string

/**
 * Gets the value of an item.
 * @param item Item to get value from
 * @returns Item value
 */
getValue(item: T): unknown

/**
 * Clears the selection cache and selected items.
 */
clearSelectionCache(): void

/**
 * Clears only the cache while preserving selected items.
 */
softClearSelectionCache(): void
